bands.description: Band 10 - Chlorophyll fluorescence peak, red edge

lagp.title: Land and atmospheric geophysical products
lagp.description:
Dataset containing variables for the 
- Green Instantaneous Fraction of Absorbed Photosynthetically Active Radiation (GI-FAPAR) 
- Terrestrial Chlorophyll Index (OTCI) 
- Integrated Water Vapour (IWV) 
- GIFAPAR by-products red and NIR rectified reflectances (RC681, RC865)

bands.name: Oa03
bands.description: Band 3 - Chlorophyll absorption maximum, biogeochemistry, vegetation

bands.name: Oa10
bands.description: Band 10 - Chlorophyll fluorescence peak, red edge

bands.name: Oa17
bands.description: Band 17 - Atmospheric / aerosol correction, clouds, pixel co-registration

gifapar.title: Green Instantaneous FAPAR (GIFAPAR)
gifapar.description: Fraction of Absorbed Photosynthetically Active Radiation (FAPAR) in the plant canopy

otci.title: OLCI Terrestrial Chlorophyll Index
otci.description: Estimates of the Chlorophyll content in terrestrial vegetation, aims at monitoring vegetation condition and health

bands.name: Oa18
bands.description: Band 18 - Water vapour absorption reference. Common reference band with SLSTR. Vegetation monitoring

bands.name: Oa19
bands.description: Band 19 - Water vapour absorption, vegetation monitoring (maximum REFLECTANCE)

iwv.title: Integrated Water Vapour Column
iwv.description: Total amount of water vapour integrated over an atmosphere column

bands.name: Oa10
bands.description: Band 10 - Chlorophyll fluorescence peak, red edge

rc681.title: Green Instantaneous FAPAR (GIFAPAR) - Rectified Reflectance - red channel
rc681.description: By-products of the GI-FAPAR, the so-called red rectified reflectance is a virtual reflectance largely decontaminated from atmospheric and angular effects, and good proxy to Top of Canopy reflectances.

bands.name: Oa17
bands.description: Band 17 - Atmospheric / aerosol correction, clouds, pixel co-registration

rc865.title: Green Instantaneous FAPAR (GIFAPAR) - Rectified Reflectance - NIR channel
rc865.description: By-products of the GI-FAPAR, the so-called NIR rectified reflectance is a virtual reflectance largely decontaminated from atmospheric and angular effects, and good proxy to Top of Canopy reflectances.

lqsf.title: Land Quality and Science Flags
lqsf.description: The quality and science flags provide information about validity, suspicious quality, cosmetic filling, environment and input quality.
